title: PlatePlate
body:
# About
Add some Plate to Minecraft.Includes planks,trapdoors and some special cubes.

Similar to the trapdoor,they are also can be waterlogged cubes,But they can't be used or activated by redstone,Its just plate.
Apart from carved plate,other plate used textures of Minecraft,it can be changed with texture pack.

![Woodden Plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23111b0772f75c8c8072b638a5de10ac5290bca8.png)

![Special Block Plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ca8fc03d439f13b250670c888a983ff8e0b8dfa.png)
It works like the original cube.
